spec.name: Under The Dark Pit
spec.description: Nice place you found yourself in. You stand in the middle of a room with only two exits, up and east. A tall ladder has been left here so that you can climb up through the pit without the use of a rope.

extra_descs.description: This is funny enough a wooden ladder and, after closer inspection, you discover it is magically held to the wall! You can't, even with your greatest effort, move it at ALL!
